title: PM call with President Trump of the United States: 8 Jan 2026
body: "The Prime Minister spoke to the President of the United States, Donald Trump, this afternoon.  The leaders discussed Euro-Atlantic security and agreed on the need to deter an increasingly aggressive Russia in the High North.  European Allies had stepped up in recent months to defend Euro-Atlantic interests, but more could be done to protect the area, the Prime Minister said.  The leaders looked forward to speaking again soon. "
